subject: SAS Annual Accessibility Info Day Post Session Info
content:
Thanks to everyone who attended our session about Student Accessibility Services for your interest and your questions.

As promised here are the handouts we referenced in the session:

1. A suggested timeline for registering with the student accessibility office. Take time to read it and mark important dates in your calendar.

2. Information on how to get a reassessment if your current assessment needs to be updated.

I wish everyone a successful first semester.

Regards,

Jennifer Wilks
Student Accessibility Services Advisor
jwilks@PSU.ca
Administration Block 555, Unit 1
